neighborhoods.name: Ciudad Vieja
neighborhoods.description: Historic peninsula center with Art Deco buildings, Mercado del Puerto, and emerging cultural scene
neighborhoods.character: Historic peninsula, Art Deco, market culture

housing.predominantType: Apartments in Art Deco and restored historic buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Montevideo. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Pocitos
neighborhoods.description: Most popular residential beach neighborhood with rambla promenade, cafes, and excellent services
neighborhoods.character: Beach residential, rambla promenade, best services
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Montevideo's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: La Blanqueada / Goes
neighborhoods.description: Central residential areas with lower costs, improving infrastructure, and local markets
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Punta Carretas
neighborhoods.description: Upscale coastal neighborhood with lighthouse, shopping mall, and the most international atmosphere
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
